working_on.task: Planning Material Design UI refactor for Settings and Widgets
working_on.notes: Transitioning from Glassmorphism/Basic UI to modern Material Design aesthetics.

pending_tasks.task: Redesign floating widget icons with Material aesthetics

recent_changes.description: Implemented robust OTA updating (Permission fixes, non-intrusive UI, Parse Error fixes)

errors_encountered.solution: Use getUriForDownloadedFile from DownloadManager instead of raw File paths.
Add canRequestPackageInstalls() check and redirect to ACTION_MANAGE_UNKNOWN_APP_SOURCES.

decisions_made.decision: Use private external files dir for OTA
decisions_made.reason: Bypasses need to prompt for generic storage permissions on modern Android.
Avoid nagging the user while driving; use a subtle settings badge instead.
